creator: mami@whale.cc.muroran-it.ac.jp
text:
ports-category: graphics

This program aims to view many pictures easily. You cannot expect
versatile performance, such as xv, gimp. This software is only to view
pictures in succession. So far, this can treat GIF, JPEG, PNG, MAG,
BMP, XPM, PNM, DjVu, and several special formats.
